description_long: This kiosk features a raised wooden platform with a set of steps leading up to it, flanked by a large, solid black vertical panel that likely serves as a backdrop or display area. On one side of the platform, there is a decorative surfboard and a small round table, suggesting a thematic or promotional function. The structure is bordered by white framing elements that provide support and a clean, modern aesthetic. The rear of the kiosk is fully enclosed with a segmented white wall, while the front is open for easy access. The overall design is minimalistic, with a focus on open space and a single prominent display area. The materials appear to be primarily wood and painted or coated structural panels.
description: A modern kiosk with a raised wooden platform, black display panel, and decorative surfboard, featuring open front access and a clean, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden steps, open platform, black display panel, and decorative surfboard with a small table on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the platform, the thickness of the black panel, and the placement of the surfboard and table.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully enclosed white segmented wall and the absence of windows or doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open platform, steps, and the arrangement of decorative elements near the black panel.
attribute_roof_design: flat, open platform with no overhead roof structure visible
